title: Testing the inference of kinematics from mock JWST NIRSpec/MSA observations of TNG50 galaxies at $z\sim2-6$
comment: Submitted to MNRAS. Key figures: 5, 8, 10, and 13. Comments welcome
summary: We use the TNG50 galaxy formation simulation to generate mock JWST NIRCam and NIRSpec microshutter array (MSA) observations of H$α$-emitting gas in $M_*=10^8-10^{11.5}\,M_\odot$ star-forming galaxies at $z=2-6$. We measure morphological properties from the mock imaging through Sersic profile fitting, and gas rotational velocities ($v$) and velocity dispersions ($σ$) by fitting the mock spectra as thin, rotating discs. To test the efficacy of such simple parametric models in describing complex ionised gas kinematics, we compare the best-fit quantities to intrinsic simulation measurements. At $z=3$, we find that $v$ and $σ$ for aligned and resolved sources generally agree well with intrinsic measurements, within a factor of $\sim$2 and $\sim$1.5, respectively. The recovery of kinematics is robust for smooth, disc-like systems, but $v$ and $σ$ can be over- or underestimated by more than a factor of 2, respectively, for intrinsically elongated systems. The scatter in the recovery accuracy is larger at higher redshift, as TNG50 galaxies at $z>3$ deviate more strongly from the thin rotating disc assumption. Despite uncertain measurements for individual galaxies, we find that key population trends, such as the weak redshift evolution of $σ$ and $v/σ$ as well as the dependence of $σ$ on the global star formation rate, are broadly recovered by our kinematic modelling. Our work provides the end-to-end framework needed to compare NIRSpec MSA observations to cosmological simulations and to quantify observational biases in measuring ionised gas kinematics, highlighting the need for the development of dedicated models for high-redshift galaxies.

AI.tldr: 使用TNG50模拟生成JWST观测数据，测试简单旋转盘模型在描述高红移星系电离气体运动学时的有效性，发现模型能大致恢复总体趋势但存在个体偏差。
AI.motivation: 评估JWST观测中使用的简单参数化模型（薄旋转盘）在描述复杂高红移星系电离气体运动学时的有效性，量化观测偏差，为比较模拟与观测提供框架。
AI.method: 使用TNG50星系形成模拟生成JWST NIRCam和NIRSpec的模拟观测数据，通过Sersic剖面拟合测量形态特性，通过拟合薄旋转盘模型测量气体旋转速度和速度弥散，并与模拟内在测量值进行比较。
AI.result: 在z=3时，对齐且分辨良好的源的速度和速度弥散与内在测量值基本一致（分别相差约2倍和1.5倍）；平滑盘状系统运动学恢复稳健，但拉长系统可能存在超过2倍的偏差；高红移散射更大，但关键总体趋势（如速度弥散的弱红移演化、与恒星形成率的关系等）能够大致恢复。
AI.conclusion: 简单旋转盘模型能够大致恢复高红移星系电离气体运动学的总体趋势，但对个体星系测量存在不确定性，需要开发专门的高红移星系模型来减少偏差。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于使用TNG50模拟生成JWST NIRSpec MSA模拟观测，测试简单旋转盘模型在描述高红移（z~2-6）星系电离气体运动学时的有效性。这与用户对高红移星系动力学、运动学以及JWST观测的强烈兴趣高度吻合。论文方法（模拟观测与模型拟合）和科学问题（运动学恢复偏差）直接关联用户的核心研究领域。虽然作者不在核心列表中，但主题和方法匹配度很高，且不涉及用户不感兴趣的领域。
recommendation.topic_fit: 高。论文主题为高红移星系电离气体运动学，直接命中用户兴趣画像中的'high-redshift galaxies'、'star-forming galaxies'、'jwst'、'kinematics'等关键词，且与'cosmic noon'、'massive main-sequence galaxy'等高度相关。
recommendation.method_fit: 高。论文使用TNG50模拟生成JWST模拟观测，并通过薄旋转盘模型拟合提取速度场和速度弥散，这与用户兴趣中'galaxy kinematics'、'dynamics'的研究方法完全一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 低。论文作者（Ravishankar Anirudh, Anna de Graaff等）不在用户的核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。论文系统性地测试了简单运动学模型在高红移的适用性，并量化了偏差，具有一定的创新性，但方法本身（模拟+拟合）并非全新。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无。论文不涉及用户不感兴趣的领域（如恒星物理、纯宇宙学、粒子物理等）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用TNG50星系形成模拟，生成了对红移z=2-6、恒星质量M_*=10^8-10^{11.5} M_⊙的恒星形成星系中Hα发射气体的模拟JWST NIRCam和NIRSpec微快门阵列（MSA）观测。通过Sérsic轮廓拟合测量模拟成像的形态特性，并通过将模拟光谱拟合为薄旋转盘来测量气体旋转速度（v）和速度弥散（σ）。为检验此类简单参数模型描述复杂电离气体运动学的有效性，我们将最佳拟合量与内禀模拟测量值进行比较。在z=3时，我们发现对准且分辨的源的v和σ通常与内禀测量值吻合良好，分别在大约2倍和1.5倍因子范围内。对于平滑的盘状系统，运动学恢复是稳健的，但对于内禀拉长的系统，v和σ可能分别被高估或低估超过2倍因子。在更高红移处，恢复精度的离散度更大，因为z>3的TNG50星系更强烈地偏离薄旋转盘假设。尽管单个星系的测量存在不确定性，但我们发现关键群体趋势，例如σ和v/σ的弱红移演化以及σ对整体恒星形成率的依赖性，被我们的运动学建模大致恢复。我们的工作提供了将NIRSpec MSA观测与宇宙学模拟进行比较并量化电离气体运动学测量中观测偏差所需的端到端框架，强调了为高红移星系开发专用模型的必要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，简单旋转盘模型能够大致恢复高红移星系电离气体运动学的总体趋势，但对个体星系测量存在不确定性，需要开发专门的高红移星系模型来减少偏差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Intrinsic \(v\) , \(\sigma\) and \(v/\sigma\) vs redshift for TNG50 galaxies with stellar masses of \(10^{8}-10^{11.5}\,{M}_{\odot}\) . The markers and the errorbars correspond to the median and the 16th and 84th percentiles, respectively. Different colours correspond to various measurement choices. Measurements from Pillepich et al. ( 2019 , see text for details) are shown in grey squares. The fiducial measurements of this work (i.e., within a radius of \(r_{e}\) of H \(\alpha\) , 0.5 ckpc pixels, unweighted) are shown as black diamonds. Light green points correspond to SFR-weighted measurements with the same binning scale as the fiducial. Orange points correspond to measurements with a pixel size of 5 ckpc (i.e., 10x worse spatial resolution than the fiducial). Purple diamonds correspond to measurements with both SFR-weighting and a pixel size of 5 ckpc. The black, grey and purple points are shown in larger sizes for emphasis (same as in Fig. 10 ). Intrinsic measurements of TNG50 galaxy kinematics can vary by up to a factor of \(\lesssim\) 2 at fixed redshift, depending on e.g. choices of aperture, spatial binning and SFR-weighting.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：恒星质量为10^{8}-10^{11.5} M_{⊙}的TNG50星系的内禀v、σ和v/σ随红移的变化。标记和误差棒分别对应中位数以及第16和第84百分位数。不同颜色对应不同的测量选择。来自Pillepich等人（2019，详见正文）的测量以灰色方块显示。本工作的基准测量（即在Hα的r_e半径内，0.5 ckpc像素，未加权）以黑色菱形显示。浅绿色点对应与基准相同分箱尺度的SFR加权测量。橙色点对应像素大小为5 ckpc（即空间分辨率比基准差10倍）的测量。紫色菱形对应同时采用SFR加权和5 ckpc像素大小的测量。黑色、灰色和紫色点以较大尺寸显示以作强调（与图10相同）。TNG50星系运动学的内禀测量在固定红移下可能变化高达约2倍因子，具体取决于孔径选择、空间分箱和SFR加权等因素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Schematic of the mocking procedure (Sec. 2.3 ), and inference of the morphological and kinematic properties (Sec. 2.4 ) adopted throughout this paper and shown here for a single example object. The positions, velocities, and SFRs of the star-forming gas in each simulated galaxy from TNG50 (left) is used to create intrinsic images or cubes. The images (cubes) are then convolved with a NIRCam (NIRSpec) PSF and noise is added (see 12 \(\times\) 12 collages). The mock images are then fit with pysersic to obtain morphological parameters such as \(q\) , PA, \(n_{s}\) and \(r_{e}\) . These parameters are then used in conjunction with kinematic forward models (assuming a thin, rotating disc) to infer the kinematics of the galaxies. We thus obtain the rotational velocity at \(r_{e}\) \(v(r_{e})\) and the velocity dispersion \(\sigma_{0}\) for each galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：模拟过程（第2.3节）以及本文采用的形态和运动学特性推断（第2.4节）的示意图，此处针对单个示例对象展示。来自TNG50每个模拟星系中恒星形成气体的位置、速度和SFR（左）用于创建内禀图像或数据立方体。然后将图像（数据立方体）与NIRCam（NIRSpec）PSF进行卷积并添加噪声（见12×12拼贴图）。随后使用pysersic拟合模拟图像以获得形态参数，如q、PA、n_s和r_e。这些参数随后与运动学前向模型（假设为薄旋转盘）结合使用，以推断星系的运动学。我们从而获得每个星系在r_e处的旋转速度v(r_e)和速度弥散σ_0。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Priors for pysersic fitting.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：pysersic拟合的先验。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Sample distribution of mock H \(\alpha\) image sizes ( \(r_{e}\) ) versus galaxy stellar mass ( \(M_{*}\) ) for TNG50 galaxies with NIRCam \((S/N)>10\) , shown as orange points. The running averages for H \(\alpha\) effective radii and 3D stellar half-mass radii are indicated in orange and black, respectively. The number of galaxies and the redshift of the snapshot are annotated in each panel. The 3D stellar half-mass radii and 2D H \(\alpha\) effective radii agree well with each other on average.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：TNG50星系中NIRCam (S/N)>10的模拟Hα图像大小（r_e）与星系恒星质量（M_*）的样本分布，以橙色点显示。Hα有效半径和3D恒星半质量半径的运行平均值分别以橙色和黑色表示。每个面板中标注了星系数量和快照红移。3D恒星半质量半径和2D Hα有效半径在平均意义上吻合良好。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Probability distribution of axis ratios ( \(q\) ) inferred from the mock NIRCam imaging of TNG50 galaxies with stellar masses of \(10^{8}-10^{11.5}\,{M}_{\odot}\) and NIRCam \((S/N)>10\) . The columns describe the redshift of the galaxy while the rows show the various bins in stellar mass (see annotations on the right). The gray line indicates the axis ratio distribution of the top left panel ( \(z=2\) , \(M_{*}=[10^{8}-10^{9})\,{M}_{\odot}\) ) for comparison. More massive galaxies at lower redshifts exhibit the smallest axis ratios, down to values of 0.1.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：从恒星质量为10^{8}-10^{11.5} M_{⊙}且NIRCam (S/N)>10的TNG50星系的模拟NIRCam成像推断的轴比（q）的概率分布。列描述星系的红移，行显示不同的恒星质量区间（见右侧注释）。灰色线表示左上方面板（z=2，M_*=[10^{8}-10^{9}) M_{⊙}）的轴比分布以作比较。较低红移处质量较大的星系表现出最小的轴比，低至0.1。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Thin disc model parameters in msafit considered in this work. Of these parameters, we mostly focus on the velocity dispersion \(\sigma_{0}\) , and on the rotational velocity \(v(r_{e})\) rather than \(v_{a}\) , with the former being the velocity of the rotation curve at \(r_{e}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：本工作中msafit考虑的薄盘模型参数。在这些参数中，我们主要关注速度弥散σ_0以及旋转速度v(r_e)而非v_a，前者是r_e处旋转曲线的速度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Collage of fit H \(\alpha\) photometry and kinematics for aligned and resolved \(z=2\) TNG50 galaxies with good kinematic fits (i.e., low \(\chi^{2}\) - see Sec. 2.4.2 ). The five columns correspond to NIRCam mock H \(\alpha\) images, NIRSpec mock H \(\alpha\) spectra, thin disc kinematic model fit to the spectra, intrinsic and best-fit rotational velocity profiles, and intrinsic and best-fit velocity dispersion profiles, respectively. The stellar masses and scales are indicated in the first column of each TNG50 galaxy. The NIRSpec/MSA mock slit is placed vertically in each case as indicated by the white rectangles. The thin disc model successfully reproduces intrinsic quantities in a variety of systems.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对准且分辨的z=2 TNG50星系中具有良好运动学拟合（即低χ²——见第2.4.2节）的Hα测光和运动学拼贴图。五列分别对应NIRCam模拟Hα图像、NIRSpec模拟Hα光谱、光谱的薄盘运动学模型拟合、内禀和最佳拟合旋转速度轮廓、以及内禀和最佳拟合速度弥散轮廓。每个TNG50星系的恒星质量和尺度在第一列中指示。NIRSpec/MSA模拟狭缝在每个情况下垂直放置，如白色矩形所示。薄盘模型成功再现了多种系统中的内禀量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Star formation rate versus stellar mass of TNG50 galaxies with stellar masses of \(10^{8}-10^{11.5}\,{M}_{\odot}\) at \(z=2,3,4,6\) for various subsets considered in this work (see legend). At all redshifts, galaxies with unsuccessful (magenta), successful (blue), and aligned \(+\) resolved (green) kinematic fits to their mock NIRSpec H \(\alpha\) spectra span the entire range of the star-forming main sequence beyond \(M_{*}=10^{8.5}\,{M}_{\odot}\) . The most massive galaxies often do not have low \(\chi^{2}\) for the kinematic fits due to bright clumps, thereby excluding them from the green subset.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：红移z=2,3,4,6处恒星质量为10^{8}-10^{11.5} M_{⊙}的TNG50星系的恒星形成率与恒星质量的关系，针对本工作中考虑的各种子集（见图例）。在所有红移处，对其模拟NIRSpec Hα光谱的运动学拟合不成功（品红色）、成功（蓝色）以及对准+分辨（绿色）的星系跨越了M_*=10^{8.5} M_{⊙}以上恒星形成主序的整个范围。质量最大的星系通常由于明亮团块而不具有低χ²的运动学拟合，从而将其排除在绿色子集之外。

title: Inside the cocoon: a comprehensive explanation of the spectra of Little Red Dots
summary: JWST has revealed a population of compact galaxies in the early Universe with broad emission lines and strong Balmer breaks; among them the so-called ''little red dots'' (LRDs). Their nature remains uncertain with hypotheses including exotic phenomena. We assemble a sample of LRD-like objects at $z>3$ and use self-consistent radiative-transfer calculations to show that a supermassive black hole accreting from a dense gas cocoon accurately reproduces the detailed spectra. We show that the cocoons must be non-spherical, with comparable amounts of inflowing and outflowing material. And we predict correlations between Balmer break strength, Balmer line-absorption and scattering line width, which we confirm in our observed sample. We reproduce all LRD-like properties without requiring star-like atmospheres and we determine the typical black hole in our sample to be of order a million solar masses, with ionized cocoon masses of tens of solar masses potentially supplied from a much larger cold-gas reservoir.

AI.tldr: JWST观测到的早期宇宙中的"小红点"星系可能是被致密气体茧包围的超大质量黑洞，而非恒星形成星系
AI.motivation: JWST在早期宇宙中发现了一类特殊的致密星系（称为"小红点"），具有宽发射线和强巴耳末跃变特征。这些天体的本质存在争议，有假说认为是奇异现象。本研究旨在通过自洽的辐射传输计算来揭示这些天体的真实物理本质。
AI.method: 收集了红移z>3的LRD-like天体样本，采用自洽的辐射传输计算，模拟超大质量黑洞从致密气体茧中吸积的场景。研究了气体茧的非球形结构，包含流入和流出物质，并预测了巴耳末跃变强度、巴耳末线吸收和散射线宽之间的相关性。
AI.result: 计算表明，被致密气体茧包围的超大质量黑洞能够准确再现观测到的详细光谱特征。气体茧必须是非球形的，包含相当数量的流入和流出物质。预测的巴耳末跃变强度、巴耳末线吸收和散射线宽之间的相关性在观测样本中得到证实。样本中典型黑洞质量约为百万太阳质量，电离茧质量约为数十太阳质量，可能来自更大的冷气体储层。
AI.conclusion: LRD-like天体的所有观测特征都可以用被致密气体茧包围的超大质量黑洞来解释，无需恒星状大气。这为早期宇宙中这些特殊致密天体的本质提供了新的理解框架。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为JWST发现的早期宇宙'小红点'（LRDs），涉及致密气体茧和超大质量黑洞，与用户画像中的'jwst'和'dense gas'关键词匹配。但论文主要关注AGN/黑洞吸积而非强引力透镜，且未涉及用户核心兴趣如星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系动力学或运动学。无核心作者匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配：涉及JWST和致密气体，但核心是AGN而非强透镜或高红移星系动力学。
recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配：使用辐射传输模拟，非强透镜方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配：无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等：LRDs是热点，但解释框架与用户主要兴趣偏离。
recommendation.negative_reason: 非强透镜研究，未涉及高红移星系动力学、运动学、偏振或多相气体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST在早期宇宙中发现了一类具有宽发射线和强巴尔默跃变的致密星系，即所谓的“小红点”（LRDs）。它们的本质仍不确定，包括奇异现象等假说。我们收集了一个红移$z>3$的LRD-like天体样本，并利用自洽的辐射转移计算表明，一个从致密气体茧中吸积的超大质量黑洞能够精确再现其详细光谱。我们证明这些茧必须是非球形的，且流入和流出物质的数量相当。我们还预测了巴尔默跃变强度、巴尔默线吸收和散射线宽之间的相关性，并在观测样本中得到了验证。我们无需恒星状大气即可再现所有LRD-like性质，并确定样本中典型黑洞的质量约为百万太阳质量，电离茧的质量为数十太阳质量，可能由更大的冷气体储库提供。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：LRD-like天体的所有观测特征都可以用被致密气体茧包围的超大质量黑洞来解释，无需恒星状大气。这为早期宇宙中这些特殊致密天体的本质提供了新的理解框架。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Properties of the LRD sample ( \(3.1 Left: JWST NIRSpec/PRISM spectra highlighting the Balmer break and the ‘v-shape’ SED. Middle: JWST imaging of a subset of the sample showing the compact nature of the sources (see imaging information for the full sample in App. A ). Right: Observed H \(\alpha\) lines on a semi-logarithmic plot showing the exponential wings (a straight line on this plot) and the red/blue symmetry of the lines. The ratio of the exponential slopes on the blue and red sides, \(v_{e,blue}/v_{e,red}\) , is indicated over each line, showing a high degree of symmetry; we note a \(>2\sigma\) asymmetry in the bottom object, ID 24 (‘the Cliff’).
figures.caption_zh: 图1: LRD样本的性质 ( \(3.1\) 左: JWST NIRSpec/PRISM光谱，突出显示了巴尔默跃变和‘v形’SED。中: 样本子集的JWST成像，显示了源的致密性质（完整样本的成像信息见附录A）。右: 半对数坐标下的观测H \(\alpha\) 线，显示了指数翼（在此图上为直线）以及线的红/蓝对称性。蓝侧和红侧指数斜率之比 \(v_{e,blue}/v_{e,red}\) 标注在每条线上方，显示出高度的对称性；我们注意到底部天体ID 24（‘悬崖’）存在 \(>2\sigma\) 的不对称性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Overview of the physical structure of an LRD-like object, showing the gas flows and the spectral-formation regions in the ionised gas cocoon surrounding the central SMBH. Left : Inputs to the model are represented by the vector field, with arrows denoting the velocity (arrow length) and density (arrow density) of the gas. The data require both inflow and outflow (see Fig. 5 and § 4.3 ). Outputs of the model are shown in the different quadrants: colours indicate the regions producing the Balmer break (red/orange), the electron density (green), and the hydrogen-line emissivity (sum of Balmer and Paschen lines, blue). Top right : radial distributions for the emission of escaped photons in H \(\alpha\) (blue), H \(\beta\) (orange), and Pa \(\beta\) (green). The different recombination lines are not released from identical radii. Bottom right : the local monochromatic mean intensity at various radii through the cocoon (with a greyscale contour plot showing the projection). This illustrates that recombination lines form in the inner ionised gas, whereas the Balmer break is formed further out, where a sufficiently large \(n=2\) population is present.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: LRD-like天体物理结构概览，显示了中心SMBH周围电离气体茧中的气体流和光谱形成区域。左: 模型的输入由矢量场表示，箭头表示气体的速度（箭头长度）和密度（箭头密度）。数据要求同时存在流入和流出（见图5和§ 4.3）。模型输出显示在不同的象限中：颜色表示产生巴尔默跃变（红/橙）、电子密度（绿）和氢线发射率（巴尔默线和帕邢线之和，蓝）的区域。右上: H \(\alpha\) （蓝）、H \(\beta\) （橙）和Pa \(\beta\) （绿）逃逸光子发射的径向分布。不同的复合线并非从相同半径释放。右下: 茧内不同半径处的局部单色平均强度（灰度等高线图显示投影）。这表明复合线形成于内部电离气体中，而巴尔默跃变形成于更外层，那里存在足够大的 \(n=2\) 布居。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of the spectra and line shapes of observed LRD-like objects ( left ) and Sirocco models ( right ). The spectra are ordered by Balmer break strength, with the corresponding H \(\alpha\) line profiles shown in the same ordering. Top left: Sequence of observed sources with increasingly prominent Balmer breaks. Top right: Spectra from a sequence of Sirocco models with varying column density in a homologous wind (keeping all other properties constant). Significant electron-scattering wings require a lower column density ( \(N_{e}\gtrsim 10^{24}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ) compared to the Balmer breaks and absorption lines ( \(N_{H}\gtrsim 10^{25}\,{cm^{-2}}\) , ( ? )). Bottom : H \(\alpha\) spectra from the same observational sample ( left ) and Sirocco density-sequence ( right ) scaled to the luminosity distance at \(z=4\) . For both models and observations, the most luminous H \(\alpha\) lines and the strongest Balmer break systems (i.e. the most massive cocoons) typically display broader wings and are more likely to have Balmer-absorption line profiles.
figures.caption_zh: 图3: 观测到的LRD-like天体（左）与Sirocco模型（右）的光谱和线形比较。光谱按巴尔默跃变强度排序，相应的H \(\alpha\) 线轮廓也按相同顺序显示。左上: 观测源序列，巴尔默跃变逐渐增强。右上: 来自Sirocco模型序列的光谱，在同向风（homologous wind）中改变柱密度（保持其他所有性质不变）。显著的电子散射翼需要较低的柱密度（ \(N_{e}\gtrsim 10^{24}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ），而巴尔默跃变和吸收线则需要较高的柱密度（ \(N_{H}\gtrsim 10^{25}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ， ( ? )）。下: 来自相同观测样本（左）和Sirocco密度序列（右）的H \(\alpha\) 光谱，按红移 \(z=4\) 处的光度距离缩放。对于模型和观测，最明亮的H \(\alpha\) 线和最强的巴尔默跃变系统（即质量最大的茧）通常显示出更宽的翼，并且更可能具有巴尔默吸收线轮廓。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of the H \(\alpha\) broad line width and the Balmer break strength for the observed sample. The curve shows an illustrative Sirocco model density-sequence. To account for reddening, we apply a dust screen with \(E(B-V)=0.8\pm 0.2\) ; the coloured curve shows the mean sequence, while the grey curves shift the models horizontally in Balmer-break strength by varying \(E(B-V)\) within the quoted range. The initial positive correlation between line width and break strength arises because both the free-electron column density and the \(n=2\) population increase with total gas column density. At sufficiently large column densities, however, the extreme scattered wings (requiring multiple scatterings) are decreased due to continuum absorption opacity. The observed data appear to follow this predicted pattern.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: 观测样本的H \(\alpha\) 宽线宽度与巴尔默跃变强度的比较。曲线显示了一个说明性的Sirocco模型密度序列。为考虑红化，我们应用了一个 \(E(B-V)=0.8\pm 0.2\) 的尘埃屏；彩色曲线显示平均序列，而灰色曲线通过改变 \(E(B-V)\) 在所述范围内来水平移动模型在巴尔默跃变强度上的位置。线宽与跃变强度之间的初始正相关是因为自由电子柱密度和 \(n=2\) 布居都随总气体柱密度增加而增加。然而，在足够大的柱密度下，极端的散射翼（需要多次散射）由于连续吸收不透明度而减小。观测数据似乎遵循这一预测模式。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Symmetry of the H \(\alpha\) scattering wings as a function of the outflow velocity. The blue curves show the line asymmetry predicted for spherical kinematics. Sample sources with significant blueshifts are plotted. All objects are strongly discrepant with a spherical outflow model, implying that both inflow and outflow must be present. The symmetry is measured by taking the ratio of the exponential slope on the blue side of the line to that on the red side. The outflow velocity is derived from the H \(\alpha\) absorption line and is plotted in units of the thermal electron velocity. The models do not predict perfectly symmetric profiles, and indeed, several objects show small, but measurable asymmetry.
figures.caption_zh: 图5: H \(\alpha\) 散射翼的对称性作为外流速度的函数。蓝色曲线显示了球对称运动学预测的线不对称性。具有显著蓝移的样本源已标出。所有天体都与球对称外流模型严重不符，这意味着必须同时存在流入和流出。对称性通过取线蓝侧指数斜率与红侧指数斜率之比来测量。外流速度由H \(\alpha\) 吸收线导出，并以热电子速度为单位绘制。模型并未预测完全对称的轮廓，事实上，几个天体显示出微小但可测量的不对称性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison of the spectra of three extreme LRDs and dust-reddened Sirocco -model spectra, matched for bolometric luminosity and spectral energy distribution (SED) shape. Left: the NIRSpec/PRISM spectra (and MIRI F770W photometry) of the noteworthy LRDs, the Cliff (upper; ref ( ? )), MoM-BH*-1 (middle; ref ( ? )), and the Rosetta Stone (lower; ref ( ? )). The Sirocco -model spectra are overplotted and match the SEDs well. Right: The H \(\alpha\) lines (and Pa \(\beta\) for the Rosetta Stone) for the NIRSpec grating observations of these sources. The comparison model lines are from the same Sirocco spectra as shown at left for each object. The Sirocco models reproduce the detailed line morphologies, including the exponential wings: for the Cliff, the model reproduces the mild asymmetry, for MoM-BH*-1 the Sirocco model reproduces strong zero-velocity absorption, and for the Rosetta Stone the Sirocco model reproduces broad exponential lines with narrower widths in H \(\alpha\) than Pa \(\beta\) as discussed in ref ( ? ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6: 三个极端LRD的光谱与尘埃红化的Sirocco模型光谱的比较，匹配了热光度与光谱能量分布（SED）形状。左: 值得注意的LRD的光谱（NIRSpec/PRISM）和测光（MIRI F770W），分别是Cliff（上；参考文献 ( ? )）、MoM-BH*-1（中；参考文献 ( ? )）和Rosetta Stone（下；参考文献 ( ? )）。Sirocco模型光谱叠加显示，并与SED吻合良好。右: 这些源的NIRSpec光栅观测的H \(\alpha\) 线（以及Rosetta Stone的Pa \(\beta\) ）。比较模型线来自左侧每个天体相同的Sirocco光谱。Sirocco模型再现了详细的线形态，包括指数翼：对于Cliff，模型再现了轻微的不对称性；对于MoM-BH*-1，Sirocco模型再现了强的零速度吸收；对于Rosetta Stone，Sirocco模型再现了宽的指数线，且H \(\alpha\) 的宽度比Pa \(\beta\) 窄，如参考文献 ( ? ) 所述。

figures.caption_en: Fig. A1: JWST /NIRCam images of the observed sample. While objects were only selected on Balmer break strength and broad H \(\alpha\) emission lines, almost all objects are compact and red, with occasional extended blue emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图A1: 观测样本的JWST /NIRCam图像。虽然天体仅根据巴尔默跃变强度和宽的H \(\alpha\) 发射线进行选择，但几乎所有天体都是致密且红色的，偶尔有延展的蓝色发射。

figures.caption_en: Fig. A2: The \(\Delta\) BIC between H \(\alpha\) broad line fits with two Gaussians (e.g. Doppler-motion dominated) compared to a single Gaussian convolved with an exponential (electron-scattering dominated). Orange cross indicates objects with evidence for absorption features.
figures.caption_zh: 图A2: H \(\alpha\) 宽线拟合的 \(\Delta\) BIC，比较了双高斯拟合（例如，多普勒运动主导）与单高斯与指数卷积拟合（电子散射主导）。橙色十字表示存在吸收特征证据的天体。

title: Local environmental dependence on weak-lensing shear statistics
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, Accepted for publication in Physical Review D
summary: Despite the assumption that an ideal FLRW observer is not dependent on the local environment, observations are biased by the positions of the observers due to the matter correlations in the large-scale structure (LSS) of the universe. The variation of the mass distribution of the LSS of the universe implies that observers residing in different locations may suffer bias in their measurements when they look at the images of distant galaxies. Here, we assess the influence of the local environment on weak gravitational lensing (WL) shear statistics in the context of relativistic $N$-body code, \texttt{gevolution}. We derive numerical constraints on the cosmological parameters from the WL shear angular power spectrum and comment on the local environment's influence on WL shear. We find tighter constraints on the parameter $Ω_\mathrm{m}$ above redshift $z$ = 0.2, which implies over this redshift the local environment's impact is minor. We also investigate the bispectrum and conclude that on average the impact of the local environment on $f_{\rm NL}$ (a measure of non-Gaussianities) is minimal and consistent with zero effect. However, we find that within the assembly of all possible observers/locations, there will also be a few that could infer the parameter $f_{\rm NL}$ of the order 10. These results could thus be used to estimate the uncertainty in the inference of cosmological parameters such as $f_{\rm NL}$ based on WL shear bispectrum and thus may have implications for future surveys requiring precision at the percent level.

AI.tldr: 研究使用gevolution相对论N体代码评估局部环境对弱引力透镜剪切统计的影响，发现局部环境对Ω_m参数约束影响较小，对f_NL参数影响平均上可忽略，但存在少数观测者位置可能显著影响f_NL推断。
AI.motivation: 尽管理想FLRW观测者被认为不依赖于局部环境，但实际观测受到大尺度结构物质关联的影响，观测者位置会导致测量偏差。研究旨在评估局部环境对弱引力透镜剪切统计的影响，特别是在宇宙学参数推断中的偏差。
AI.method: 使用相对论N体代码gevolution，分析弱引力透镜剪切角功率谱，推导宇宙学参数的数值约束，并研究局部环境对剪切统计的影响。同时研究双谱（bispectrum）以评估局部环境对非高斯性参数f_NL的影响。
AI.result: 在红移z>0.2时，Ω_m参数约束更紧，表明在此红移范围内局部环境影响较小。对f_NL参数，平均影响极小且与零效应一致。然而，在所有可能的观测者位置中，少数位置可能推断出f_NL约为10的量级。
AI.conclusion: 局部环境对弱引力透镜剪切统计的影响在大多数情况下较小，但存在少数观测者位置可能显著影响f_NL参数的推断。这些结果可用于估计基于弱引力透镜剪切双谱推断宇宙学参数（如f_NL）的不确定性，对未来需要百分之一精度水平的巡天调查具有重要意义。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为弱引力透镜剪切统计的局部环境依赖性，属于弱引力透镜和宇宙学参数约束范畴。用户核心兴趣是强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系动力学和多相气体。虽然论文涉及引力透镜，但属于弱透镜而非强透镜，且不涉及高红移星系动力学、多相气体或用户核心作者。因此相关性较低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 弱引力透镜与强引力透镜在科学问题和方法上差异较大，用户兴趣集中在强透镜和高红移星系，而本文聚焦弱透镜剪切统计和宇宙学参数约束，主题匹配度低。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用相对论N体代码gevolution分析弱透镜剪切角功率谱和双谱，与用户常用的强透镜建模、高分辨率成像和光谱学方法不匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者列表中无用户核心作者（如daizhong liu, jianhang chen, natascha m förster schreiber等），作者匹配度低。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文评估局部环境对弱透镜统计的影响，具有一定新颖性，但与用户兴趣领域关联弱。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于弱引力透镜和宇宙学参数约束，非用户核心的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或多相气体研究。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 尽管理想的FLRW观测者被认为不依赖于局部环境，但由于宇宙大尺度结构（LSS）中的物质相关性，观测结果会受到观测者位置的影响。宇宙LSS质量分布的变化意味着，位于不同位置的观测者在观测遥远星系图像时，其测量结果可能存在偏差。本文在相对论性N体代码\texttt{gevolution}的框架下，评估了局部环境对弱引力透镜（WL）剪切统计的影响。我们从WL剪切角功率谱推导出宇宙学参数的数值约束，并讨论了局部环境对WL剪切的影响。我们发现，在红移$z$ = 0.2以上，对参数$Ω_\mathrm{m}$的约束更为严格，这表明在该红移范围内局部环境的影响较小。我们还研究了双谱，并得出结论：平均而言，局部环境对$f_{\rm NL}$（非高斯性度量）的影响极小，且与零效应一致。然而，我们发现，在所有可能的观测者/位置集合中，也存在少数观测者可能推断出$f_{\rm NL}$参数的量级为10。因此，这些结果可用于估计基于WL剪切双谱推断宇宙学参数（如$f_{\rm NL}$）的不确定性，从而可能对未来需要百分之一精度水平的巡天调查产生影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，局部环境对弱引力透镜剪切统计的影响在大多数情况下较小，但存在少数观测者位置可能显著影响$f_{\rm NL}$参数的推断。这些结果可用于估计基于弱引力透镜剪切双谱推断宇宙学参数（如$f_{\rm NL}$）的不确定性，对未来需要百分之一精度水平的巡天调查具有重要意义。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Schematic diagram summarizing all the packages that we use for different purposes in this paper.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本文中用于不同目的的所有软件包的示意图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : The expected constraints on cosmological parameters depend on the redshift of the data used. The constraints are computed using simulations with \(H_{0}=67.556\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\,{Mpc}^{-1}\) , and \(\Omega_{{m}}=0.312\) . Next, a shear angular power spectrum that is theoretically derived is compared to this mock angular power spectrum based on \(\Omega_{{m}}\) and \(H_{0}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：对宇宙学参数的预期约束取决于所用数据的红移。这些约束是使用模拟计算得出的，其中\(H_{0}=67.556\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\,{Mpc}^{-1}\)和\(\Omega_{{m}}=0.312\)。然后，将理论推导的剪切角功率谱与基于\(\Omega_{{m}}\)和\(H_{0}\)的模拟角功率谱进行比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Constraints on the cosmological parameter \(\Omega_{{m}}\) with respect to source redshift. The constraints are based on the angular power spectrum of WL shear of 49,152 sources, simulated using \(\Omega_{{m}}=0.312\) . The constraints are analogous to those shown in Figure 6 , but they are marginalised over \(H_{0}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：宇宙学参数\(\Omega_{{m}}\)相对于源红移的约束。这些约束基于49,152个源的WL剪切角功率谱，模拟时使用\(\Omega_{{m}}=0.312\)。这些约束与图6所示类似，但已对\(H_{0}\)进行了边缘化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : Constraints on the parameter \(H_{0}\) as a function of source redshift. The constraints are based on the angular power spectrum of WL shear of 49,152 sources, simulated using \(H_{0}=67.556\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\,{Mpc}^{-1}\) . The constraints are similar to those presented in Fig. 6 but marginalised over \(\Omega_{{m}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：参数\(H_{0}\)作为源红移函数的约束。这些约束基于49,152个源的WL剪切角功率谱，模拟时使用\(H_{0}=67.556\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\,{Mpc}^{-1}\)。这些约束与图6所示类似，但已对\(\Omega_{{m}}\)进行了边缘化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 9 : An analysis of the \(isosceles\) configuration of the shear bispectrum with respect to redshift when observers are positioned in haloes with varying masses. In this context, markers are used to represent mean values, while error bars of varying colours are used to display the data around the mean values for separate redshifts within each mass range. The different shaded regions indicate the expected deviation band if the observer is randomly located within the simulation box.
figures.caption_zh: 图9：当观测者位于不同质量的晕中时，剪切双谱的\(isosceles\)构型随红移的分析。在此上下文中，标记用于表示平均值，而不同颜色的误差棒用于显示每个质量范围内不同红移的数据围绕平均值的分布。不同的阴影区域表示如果观测者随机位于模拟盒内时的预期偏差带。

figures.caption_en: Figure 10 : An analysis of the \(squeezed\) configuration of the shear bispectrum with respect to redshift when observers are positioned in haloes with varying masses. In this context, markers are used to represent mean values, while error bars of varying colours are used to display the data around the mean values for separate redshifts within each mass range. The different shaded regions indicate the expected deviation band if the observer is randomly located within the simulation box.
figures.caption_zh: 图10：当观测者位于不同质量的晕中时，剪切双谱的\(squeezed\)构型随红移的分析。在此上下文中，标记用于表示平均值，而不同颜色的误差棒用于显示每个质量范围内不同红移的数据围绕平均值的分布。不同的阴影区域表示如果观测者随机位于模拟盒内时的预期偏差带。

figures.caption_en: Figure 11 : An analysis of the \(isosceles\) configuration of the shear bispectrum with respect to redshift when observers are positioned in voids having different radii. In this context, markers are used to represent mean values, while error bars of varying colours are used to display the data around the mean values for separate redshifts within each radius range. The different shaded regions indicate the expected deviation band if the observer is randomly located within the simulation box.
figures.caption_zh: 图11：当观测者位于不同半径的 voids 中时，剪切双谱的\(isosceles\)构型随红移的分析。在此上下文中，标记用于表示平均值，而不同颜色的误差棒用于显示每个半径范围内不同红移的数据围绕平均值的分布。不同的阴影区域表示如果观测者随机位于模拟盒内时的预期偏差带。

figures.caption_en: Figure 12 : An analysis of the \(squeezed\) configuration of the shear bispectrum with respect to redshift when observers are positioned in voids having different radii. In this context, markers are used to represent mean values, while error bars of varying colours are used to display the data around the mean values for separate redshifts within each radius range. The different shaded regions indicate the expected deviation band if the observer is randomly located within the simulation box.
figures.caption_zh: 图12：当观测者位于不同半径的 voids 中时，剪切双谱的\(squeezed\)构型随红移的分析。在此上下文中，标记用于表示平均值，而不同颜色的误差棒用于显示每个半径范围内不同红移的数据围绕平均值的分布。不同的阴影区域表示如果观测者随机位于模拟盒内时的预期偏差带。

title: Low-frequency-selected Fast Radio Burst Host Galaxy Candidates
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures, accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: We present a pilot study on the host galaxy environments of CHIME/FRBs by cross-matching baseband-localised events with the LOFAR Two-metre Sky Survey Data Release 2 (LoTSS DR2) at 144 MHz. Unlike traditional methods reliant on optical imaging, our radio-based selection allows for the identification of dust-obscured or optically faint star-forming galaxies. Of the 140 CHIME FRBs considered, 33 lie within the LoTSS DR2 footprint, and 16 show potential radio counterparts. Through multi-wavelength analysis, spectral energy distribution (SED) fitting, and redshift constraints from the Macquart relation, we identify two secure and one tentative host candidates, all consistent with active star formation. However, their H$α$-derived star formation rates appear underestimated, likely due to significant dust attenuation, as suggested by infrared colours and compact optical morphologies. Our results highlight the value of low-frequency radio data in complementing optical host searches and demonstrate the feasibility of host identification even in the absence of optical confirmation. With forthcoming data from LoTSS DR3 and the full CHIME/FRB baseband release, this method offers a promising path toward statistically robust studies of FRB host galaxies and their environments.

AI.tldr: 通过交叉匹配CHIME/FRB事件与LOFAR低频射电巡天数据，本研究识别出快速射电暴的潜在宿主星系，展示了射电数据在补充光学宿主搜索方面的价值。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖光学成像识别FRB宿主星系，可能遗漏尘埃遮蔽或光学暗弱的恒星形成星系。本研究旨在利用低频射电数据补充光学搜索，更全面地识别FRB宿主星系。
AI.method: 将CHIME/FRB基础波段定位事件与LOFAR两米巡天数据发布2（144 MHz）进行交叉匹配，通过多波段分析、光谱能量分布拟合和Macquart关系红移约束来识别宿主星系候选体。
AI.result: 在140个CHIME FRB中，33个位于LoTSS DR2覆盖区内，16个显示潜在射电对应体。最终识别出2个确定和1个暂定的宿主候选体，均与活跃恒星形成一致，但Hα衍生的恒星形成率可能因尘埃衰减而被低估。
AI.conclusion: 低频射电数据能有效补充光学宿主搜索，即使没有光学确认也能识别FRB宿主星系。随着更多数据发布，该方法为FRB宿主星系及其环境的统计研究提供了有前景的途径。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究快速射电暴（FRB）的宿主星系，与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振、高红移多相气体）几乎没有直接关联。虽然涉及尘埃和恒星形成星系等泛关键词，但科学问题、方法、数据或核心作者均未与用户画像中的核心主题（如引力透镜、暗物质、高红移星系、核心作者群）对齐。用户明确要求优先考虑强引力透镜研究，而本论文完全不涉及透镜。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为FRB宿主星系，与用户的核心主题（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等）不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。方法为射电巡天交叉匹配和SED拟合，与引力透镜建模、高红移星系动力学分析等方法无关。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文在FRB领域有一定新颖性，但与用户兴趣领域无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文完全不涉及引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移偏振或多相气体等用户优先主题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过将基带定位的快速射电暴（FRB）事件与LOFAR两米巡天第二次数据发布（LoTSS DR2）在144 MHz处的数据进行交叉匹配，对CHIME/FRB的宿主星系环境进行了一项先导研究。与依赖光学成像的传统方法不同，我们的射电选择方法能够识别尘埃遮蔽或光学暗淡的恒星形成星系。在所考虑的140个CHIME FRB中，有33个位于LoTSS DR2覆盖范围内，其中16个显示出潜在的射电对应体。通过多波段分析、光谱能量分布（SED）拟合以及来自Macquart关系的红移约束，我们确定了两个可靠的和一个暂定的宿主候选体，它们均与活跃的恒星形成活动一致。然而，它们基于Hα的恒星形成速率似乎被低估了，这很可能是由于显著的尘埃消光所致，红外颜色和紧凑的光学形态也暗示了这一点。我们的结果凸显了低频射电数据在补充光学宿主搜索方面的价值，并展示了即使在没有光学确认的情况下进行宿主识别的可行性。随着即将发布的LoTSS DR3数据和完整的CHIME/FRB基带数据，该方法为对FRB宿主星系及其环境进行统计稳健的研究提供了一条有前景的途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：低频射电数据能有效补充光学宿主搜索，即使没有光学确认也能识别FRB宿主星系。随着更多数据发布，该方法为FRB宿主星系及其环境的统计研究提供了有前景的途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sky distribution of 140 CHIME/FRB baseband-detected events (black circles) overlaid on the LoTSS DR2 survey footprint (shaded region). This figure illustrates which FRBs lie within the LoTSS coverage area based on the multi-order coverage (MOC) map. A total of 33 FRBs are found to fall within the footprint and are eligible for further cross-matching analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：140个CHIME/FRB基带探测事件（黑色圆圈）的天空分布，叠加在LoTSS DR2巡天覆盖区域（阴影区域）上。该图基于多阶覆盖（MOC）图说明了哪些FRB位于LoTSS覆盖区域内。共有33个FRB位于覆盖区域内，符合进一步交叉匹配分析的条件。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The correlation between FRB–radio-source separation and flux density for non-star objects in the LoTSS DR2 release. Coloured stars mark significant outliers from the random distribution, identified based on the KDE chance-alignment analysis and suggesting a higher likelihood of being the true host. Grey shade indicates density of matches to 15000 random points, and black contours, from the outermost to the innermost, represent the cumulative distributions of \(99.9\%,\ 99\%,\ 95\%,\ 90\%,\ 75\%,\ and\ 50\%\) of the random points, respectively. Red points represent the matched FRBs, with error bars indicating the spatial extent of each radio galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：LoTSS DR2数据发布中非恒星天体的FRB-射电源分离度与流量密度之间的相关性。彩色星形标记了随机分布中的显著异常值，这些异常值基于核密度估计（KDE）偶然对齐分析识别，表明其更可能是真实宿主。灰色阴影表示与15000个随机点的匹配密度，黑色轮廓线从外到内分别代表随机点累积分布的\(99.9\%,\ 99\%,\ 95\%,\ 90\%,\ 75\%,\ and\ 50\%\)。红点代表匹配到的FRB，误差棒表示每个射电星系的空间延展范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Optical and radio images of two secure candidates. Top panels : False-colour RGB images constructed from the \(g\) , \(r\) , and \(z\) bands of the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) Legacy Imaging Surveys for two secure candidates. The white ellipses represent the \(1\sigma\) and \(2\sigma\) localisation uncertainty regions of the FRB, with the white cross marking the FRB centroid and the cyan cross indicating the position of the matched LoTSS radio source. Bottom panels : LoTSS DR2 radio continuum images of the same regions.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：两个可靠候选体的光学和射电图像。上排：由暗能量光谱仪器（DESI）遗产成像巡天的\(g\)、\(r\)和\(z\)波段构建的两个可靠候选体的假彩色RGB图像。白色椭圆代表FRB的\(1\sigma\)和\(2\sigma\)定位不确定区域，白色十字标记FRB质心，青色十字表示匹配到的LoTSS射电源的位置。下排：同一区域的LoTSS DR2射电连续谱图像。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Basic properties of the CHIME/FRB events and their matched LoTSS DR2 radio counterparts. Dispersion measures (DMs) and the corresponding Galactic contributions at the FRB positions are taken from the CHIME/FRB baseband catalogue (CHIME/FRB Collaboration et al. , 2024 ) . The extragalactic DM values, corrected for the Milky Way contribution using the NE2001 model (Cordes and Lazio, 2002 ) , are adopted from CHIME/FRB Collaboration et al. ( 2021 ) . The table reports four redshift estimates: \(z_{FRB}\) , inferred from the central DM–redshift relation of Macquart et al. ( 2020 ) (see their Fig. 2) following the method described in Section 3.1 , with uncertainties derived from the intrinsic scatter (central 90 percent range) of the relation; \(z_{spec},\) the spectroscopic redshift from the DESI Extragalactic Science Project and from this work, respectively; \(z_{phot}\) , the photometric redshift of the associated host galaxy from Zhou et al. ( 2021 ) ; and \(z_{DM\,Tang23}\) , the DM–redshift estimate reported by Tang et al. ( 2023 ) . The positions and flux densities of the LoTSS counterparts are taken from Shimwell et al. ( 2022 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：CHIME/FRB事件及其匹配到的LoTSS DR2射电对应体的基本属性。色散量（DM）及其在FRB位置处的银河系贡献取自CHIME/FRB基带星表（CHIME/FRB Collaboration et al., 2024）。使用NE2001模型（Cordes and Lazio, 2002）扣除银河系贡献后的河外DM值取自CHIME/FRB Collaboration et al. (2021)。该表报告了四个红移估计值：\(z_{FRB}\)，根据Macquart et al. (2020)的中心DM–红移关系（见其图2）并按照第3.1节描述的方法推断得出，不确定性来源于该关系的固有弥散（中心90%范围）；\(z_{spec}\)，分别来自DESI河外科学项目和本工作的光谱红移；\(z_{phot}\)，来自Zhou et al. (2021)的相关宿主星系的光度红移；以及\(z_{DM\,Tang23}\)，由Tang et al. (2023)报告的DM–红移估计值。LoTSS对应体的位置和流量密度取自Shimwell et al. (2022)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Colour–mass diagram, where green-valley galaxies lie between the two green lines. The yellow star marks the FRB 20190303B host-galaxy candidate MCG+11-11-014. Contours indicate the SDSS spectroscopic sample (Chang et al. , 2015 ) . Green lines show the green valley defined by Schawinski et al. ( 2014 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：颜色–质量图，其中绿谷星系位于两条绿线之间。黄色星形标记FRB 20190303B的宿主星系候选体MCG+11-11-014。等高线表示SDSS光谱样本（Chang et al., 2015）。绿线表示由Schawinski et al. (2014)定义的绿谷。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Radial surface brightness profiles of the candidate FRB 20190303B host galaxy MCG+11-11-014 in the \(g\) -band (left), \(r\) -band (middle), and the corresponding colour profile ( \(\mu_{g}-\mu_{r}\) , right). Error bars represent photometric uncertainties propagated from the intensity measurements. The vertical dashed lines indicate the semi-major axis (SMA) radius corresponding to the FRB centre position. The colour profile shows a mild radial gradient, potentially reflecting variations in stellar population or internal dust attenuation.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：候选FRB 20190303B宿主星系MCG+11-11-014在\(g\)波段（左）、\(r\)波段（中）的径向表面亮度轮廓，以及相应的颜色轮廓（\(\mu_{g}-\mu_{r}\)，右）。误差棒表示从强度测量中传播的光度不确定性。垂直虚线表示对应于FRB中心位置的半长轴（SMA）半径。颜色轮廓显示出轻微径向梯度，可能反映了恒星种群或内部尘埃消光的变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The W2–W3 versus W1–W2 diagram, where W1, W2, and W3 denote the WISE mid-infrared photometric bands, used to separate objects into different classes. The purple, yellow, and green stars indicate the host galaxies selected in this work and listed in Table 1 . The arrow marks an upper limit for FRB 20181214C, as no W3 measurement is available. The background black dots are SDSS spectroscopic galaxy sample (Chang et al. , 2015 ) . The blue square indicates the FRB hosts in Gordon et al. ( 2023 ) , and the cyan square indicates the FRB hosts in Bhardwaj et al. ( 2024b )
figures.caption_zh: 图6：W2–W3与W1–W2图，其中W1、W2和W3表示WISE中红外测光波段，用于将天体分为不同类别。紫色、黄色和绿色星形标记了本工作中选择的宿主星系，并列于表1中。箭头表示FRB 20181214C的上限，因为没有可用的W3测量值。背景黑点是SDSS光谱星系样本（Chang et al., 2015）。蓝色方块表示Gordon et al. (2023)中的FRB宿主，青色方块表示Bhardwaj et al. (2024b)中的FRB宿主。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Optical and radio images of the tentative candidiate. Left panel : False-colour RGB images constructed from the \(g\) , \(r\) , and \(z\) bands of the DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys for the tentative candidate. The white ellipses represent the \(1\sigma\) and \(2\sigma\) localisation uncertainty regions of the FRB, with the white cross marking the FRB centroid and the red cross indicating the position of the matched LoTSS radio source. Right panel : LoTSS DR2 radio continuum images of the same regions. Cyan contours represent emission levels at 2, 3, and 4 times the local RMS noise.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：暂定候选体的光学和射电图像。左图：由DESI遗产成像巡天的\(g\)、\(r\)和\(z\)波段构建的暂定候选体的假彩色RGB图像。白色椭圆代表FRB的\(1\sigma\)和\(2\sigma\)定位不确定区域，白色十字标记FRB质心，红色十字表示匹配到的LoTSS射电源的位置。右图：同一区域的LoTSS DR2射电连续谱图像。青色等高线表示局部RMS噪声的2、3和4倍处的发射水平。
